_comment: mode: 'all' = every tool available. 'allowlist' = only listed tools. 'denylist' = everything except listed tools.

_groups.group:desktop: desktop_screenshot, desktop_click, desktop_type, desktop_hotkey, desktop_scroll, screen_analyze, screen_find, screen_click_on, window_list, window_focus, open_app
_groups.group:social: x_*, grok_*, ig_*, fb_*, linkedin_*, tiktok_*, yt_*
_groups.group:documents: create_document, read_document, open_document, create_spreadsheet, create_pdf, create_presentation, write_in_writer
